title: rubus × questierifrons
intro: Rubus × questerrianus  (previously known as Rubus × questieri and also sometimes referred to as Rubus × questierifrons), is a rare hybrid of Rubus arcticus and Rubus idaeus, commonly known as arctic raspberry and European red raspberry, respectively. The Rubus × questerrianus plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Rubus × questerrianus typically involve drying and processing the leaves and roots, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
